mapper.sql: id, project_id, page_id, layer_name, layer_type, z_index, pos_x, pos_y, width, height, text_content, font_size, font_color, font_weight, font_family, font_style, text_decoration, line_height, letter_spacing, opacity, text_align, border_radius, `background`, image_url, sort_order, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_layer (project_id, page_id, layer_name, layer_type, z_index, pos_x, pos_y, width, height, text_content, font_size, font_color, font_weight, font_family, font_style, text_decoration, line_height, letter_spacing, opacity, text_align, border_radius, `background`, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{pageId}, #{layerName}, #{layerType}, #{zIndex}, #{posX}, #{posY}, #{width}, #{height}, #{textContent}, #{fontSize}, #{fontColor}, #{fontWeight}, #{fontFamily}, #{fontStyle}, #{textDecoration}, #{lineHeight}, #{letterSpacing}, #{opacity}, #{textAlign}, #{borderRadius}, #{background}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE ad_layer SET layer_name = #{layerName}, layer_type = #{layerType}, z_index = #{zIndex}, pos_x = #{posX}, pos_y = #{posY}, width = #{width}, height = #{height}, text_content = #{textContent}, font_size = #{fontSize}, font_color = #{fontColor}, font_weight = #{fontWeight}, font_family = #{fontFamily}, font_style = #{fontStyle}, text_decoration = #{textDecoration}, line_height = #{lineHeight}, letter_spacing = #{letterSpacing}, opacity = #{opacity}, text_align = #{textAlign}, border_radius = #{borderRadius}, `background` = #{background}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
